holdings.infoBox: NERD is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are NetEase stock at 11.55%, Electronic Arts at 8.83%, Nintendo Co at 8.74%, Take-Two Interactive Software at 8.31%, and Roblox at 6.47%.

overview.description: The Roundhill Video Games ETF (NERD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks total returns by actively managing a portfolio of equity securities in the global video games and eSports industry. NERD was launched on Jun 4, 2019 and is issued by Roundhill.
infoTable: Nasdaq CTA Global Video Games Software Index
